name: chr21_21q21_intrachromosomal_SD_blocks
description: 21q21 hosts several intrachromosomal SD blocks (NCAM2-flanking, APP upstream) of 50-200 kb at >95% identity. Hot region for somatic copy-number changes in Alzheimer-like APP duplications and rare 21q21.3 microdeletions affecting NCAM2.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct-oriented 50-200 kb SD blocks flanking NCAM2 and APP; NAHR-mediated APP-locus duplications cause early-onset familial Alzheimer disease.
